name: Lemon Chicken with Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into 4 pieces or cube them to bite-sized portions.
2. In a deep frying pan, sauté the chicken and mushrooms in half of the white wine with basil, lemon slices, and chives until mostly cooked through. Add more wine as needed.
3. Pour in the rest of the white wine (or additional) and add the tomato sauce. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
4. The lemon wedges should be thoroughly cooked and can be eaten.
5. Serve over steamed rice. Top with a sprinkle of Parmesan or mozzarella cheese (not too much) and a little sprinkle of chives. It's good without the cheese as well.
6. Garnish with a fresh sprig of basil and lemon wedges from the unused half of the lemon.
7. Serves 2 (plenty).
NOTE: The white wine can be replaced with apple juice. Cooking mushrooms in apple juice until reduced down to almost nothing results in fewer calories than using butter, and it tastes great. Sometimes a clove of garlic is added when using apple juice instead of wine.
